# Avatar

Styled avatar component family built on zw-avatar primitives.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/avatar</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">zweb add avatar</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Add

```bash
zweb add avatar
```

## Imports

Styled component:

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar'
```

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@zeus-web/avatar/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/avatar/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop    | Type                                          | Default  | Description   |
| ------- | --------------------------------------------- | -------- | ------------- |
| `size`  | `AvatarSize`<br />Values: `sm`, `md`, `lg`    | `md`     | Avatar size.  |
| `shape` | `AvatarShape`<br />Values: `circle`, `square` | `circle` | Avatar shape. |

## Events

| Event         | React prop     | Detail               | Description                              |
| ------------- | -------------- | -------------------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `image-load`  | `onImageLoad`  | `nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when avatar image loads.         |
| `image-error` | `onImageError` | `nativeEvent: Event` | Emitted when avatar image fails to load. |

## Slots

| Slot      | Description                              |
| --------- | ---------------------------------------- |
| `default` | AvatarImage and AvatarFallback children. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-muted`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=avatar-root]`
- `[data-slot=avatar-image]`
- `[data-slot=avatar-fallback]`

## Registry

Type: `registry:ui`

Dependencies:

- `@zeus-web/avatar`
- `class-variance-authority`
- `clsx`
- `tailwind-merge`

Files:

- `default/lib/utils.ts` → `lib/utils.ts` (`registry:lib`)
- `default/avatar.tsx` → `components/ui/avatar.tsx` (`registry:ui`)

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use AvatarImage with meaningful alt text.
- Always provide AvatarFallback.

Do not:

- Do not use Avatar for decorative icons.
- Do not omit fallback content.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar'\n\nexport function Example() {\n  return (\n    <Avatar>\n      <AvatarImage src="/avatar.png" alt="User" />\n      <AvatarFallback>ZW</AvatarFallback>\n    </Avatar>\n  )\n}
```
